description_long: This object consists of two small potted plants, each housed in a distinct ceramic pot with matching saucers. The left pot is decorated with a wavy line and dot pattern in muted tones of gray and beige, while the right pot is a soft mauve color adorned with white polka dots. Both pots contain lush green plants with broad, flat leaves arranged in layered whorls, suggesting a healthy, well-maintained appearance. The soil in each pot is visible and appears dark and slightly textured, typical of potting mix. The pots are compact and likely lightweight, suitable for placement on small surfaces. The overall aesthetic is playful and decorative, making these plants ideal for brightening up urban indoor spaces.
description: A pair of small, decorative potted plants with broad green leaves in patterned ceramic pots, one with wavy motifs and the other with polka dots. Both are vibrant and well-suited for indoor display.
description_view_0: Two potted plants side by side, clearly showing the wavy-patterned pot on the left and the polka-dotted pot on the right.
description_view_1: Front view of the polka-dotted pot, with the wavy-patterned pot partially visible behind it.
description_view_2: Reverse angle showing the polka-dotted pot on the left and the wavy-patterned pot on the right, both fully visible.
description_view_3: Front view of the wavy-patterned pot, with the polka-dotted pot partially visible behind it.
attribute_plant_species: generic houseplant (possibly Peperomia or similar broad-leafed variety)
attribute_pot_decoration: wavy line and dot pattern; white polka dots
